top_signals.title: Stockpiling helps manufacturing sector power through Iran war blows
top_signals.summary: The manufacturing sector has powered through the turmoil brought by the Iran war as output grew at the fastest pace in 21 months, according to a business survey.  S&P Global researchers said that output growth accelerated as firms rushed to stockpile goods ahead of further expected trade turmoil in the Middle East.  The overall purchasing [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman’s Oppenheimer Sees Stock Gains Broadening in Second Half
top_signals.summary: Global equities are set to extend their searing second-quarter rally, with earnings growth at technology companies a key driver, according to Peter Oppenheimer at Goldman Sachs Group, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Wall Street’s AI Race Is Fueling New Fears of Crowded Trading
top_signals.summary: From hedge funds to wealth managers, Wall Street has embraced artificial intelligence in search of an investing edge. Researchers are now asking what happens when more investors turn to similar AI models to find one: buying the same stocks, reacting to the same headlines, and sometimes making the same mistakes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
top_signals.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Africa Plans to Tap Rand Sukuk Bonds This Year
top_signals.summary: South Africa will tap existing rand-denominated sukuk bonds as part of its funding plans for the current fiscal year.

top_signals.title: What’s at Stake in USMCA Negotiations?
top_signals.summary: The US-Mexico-Canada Agreement entered into force six years ago and is the outline for almost $2 trillion in annual trade among the three countries. A countdown to the expiry of the agreement is set to begin as officials launch a review of the trade deal that President Donald Trump signed during his first term. Brendan Murray reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Fortuna lifts West Africa growth with $1B Senegal gold project
top_signals.summary: "Diamba Sud's feasibility study is slightly better than our prior forecast," BMO analyst says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Guardian may skip feasibility on $660M Nevada tungsten mine
top_signals.summary: Pilot Mountain is among the most advanced US tungsten projects.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ealing stalls on Voi contract as ‘sensitive discussions’ threaten West London e-bike network
top_signals.summary: Ealing Council has held back from signing a fresh e-bike agreement with operator Voi, City AM understands, stalling its upcoming operating period as backroom negotiations expose growing regulatory divide on London’s high streets. Town hall chiefs have admitted that negotiations have hit a deadlock, revealing they are mired in non-disclosure talks ahead of a looming [...]

top_signals.title: Why I’ve fallen back in love with the iPod
top_signals.summary: In a world where digital ownership is increasingly rare, Simon Hunt returned to technology from 2007 – and hasn’t looked back. Not since childhood had I been this excited to open a parcel. I tore through layers of brown sticky tape, clawed through the cardboard box and unpeeled the bubble wrap. And there it was: [...]

top_signals.title: Atlantic Strategic confirms viability, 12-month pathway for monazite processing plant
top_signals.summary: The project would initially begin with a demonstration plant capable of producing 1,000 tonnes per annum of monazite concentrate.
